title: M1-M10: Medium severity security findings
description: M1: Date freshness (overlaps H1). M2: OG meta not escaped. M3: RSS username not XML-escaped. M4: No Cache-Control headers. M5: LIKE wildcards not escaped. M6: Unsigned to/cc spoofable. M7: No inbox rate limit. M8: Null bytes not rejected. M9: Multipart buffered before size check. M10: No WS connection limit.
